title: Better Snowball
description: A simple mod add more species snowball.
body:
#### A simple mod add more species snowball.


#### Stone,Ice,Iron,Gold,Diamond and Compression Snowball
Stone and Compression Snowball have 1 point damage.  
Ice is 2.  
Gold is 3.  
Diamond is 6.  

 Instant Health Snowball is no damage,but is can make be hit entity will have a short Instant Health effect.

 Confusion Snowball is no damage,but is can make be hit entity will have a short Nausea effect.

 Posion Snowball is no damage,but is can make be hit entity will have a short potion effect.

Teleporting Snowball can make be hit entity teleporting some distance.

#### Recipes
You can check recipes in REI or JEI mod.
